<!--
Thanks for sending a PR! Fill in what's relevant and delete the rest.
Keep it short — reviewers prefer a clear "why" over a long checklist.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Test (only)
- [ ] Build / packaging
- [ ] CI
- [ ] Chore

## Testing performed

<!-- How did you verify this works? `pytest`, a specific test, manual repro, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off via DCO (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if public API or behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if this is user-facing
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, mnemonics, or credentials in the diff
